locations.name: West of House
locations.description: You are standing in an open field west of a white house, with a boarded front door.

items.name: Mailbox
items.description: A small mailbox. It appears to be closed.

contents.name: Leaflet
contents.description: The leaflet reads: 'Welcome to Dungine! This is a demo world showing the text adventure capabilities.'

locations.name: North of House
locations.description: You are facing the north side of a white house. There is no door here, and all the windows are boarded up.

locations.name: South of House
locations.description: You are facing the south side of a white house. There is no door here, and all the windows are boarded up.

locations.name: Behind House
locations.description: You are behind the white house. A path leads into the forest to the east. In one corner of the house there is a small window which is slightly ajar.

items.name: Window
items.description: The window is slightly ajar, but not enough to allow entry.

locations.name: Forest Path
locations.description: This is a path winding through a dimly lit forest. The path continues to the north and south, and west towards the house.

locations.name: Clearing
locations.description: You are in a clearing in the forest. Sunlight streams down through the trees.

items.name: Brass Lantern
items.description: A shiny brass lantern. It appears to be off.
